name: 12th Ave Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at 12th Ave Recreation Center in Norman, OK! There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.
open_play_schedule: For outdoor courts, go to Norman Pickleball FB to when and if anyone is playing.

name: Cleveland County Family YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Cleveland County Family YMCA in Norman, OK! There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include water, lights, and restrooms. You can reserve the courts. A membership is required to play.

name: Crosspointe Church
description: Crosspointe Church is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Norman, OK. There are 4 indoor hard courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. Players have access to lights, water, restrooms, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts are free.

name: First Baptist Church Family Life Center
description: First Baptist Church Family Life Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Norman, OK. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: First Moore Baptist Church
description: First Moore Baptist Church is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Moore, OK. There are 6 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.

name: Hey Pickle Pickle
description: Come play pickleball at Hey Pickle Pickle in Norman, OK! There are 5 indoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are available. Amenities include food, restrooms, trainers or lessons, a pro shop or equipment store, lights, and water.

name: Kiwanis Park
description: Kiwanis Park is a place to play pickleball in Moore, OK. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like lights. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are free.

name: Premier Sportsplex
description: Premier Sportsplex is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Norman, OK. There are 12 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms. The courts can be reserved. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Pryor's Pizza Kitchen
description:
Availability Thursday & Friday after 4, All day Saturday and Sunday. Please go to our website Pryorspizza.com to book and reserve your court. Guests are welcome to bring their own equipment or rent ours for $3 per paddle in person when you check in for your reservation. **Please note, if you break one of our paddles you will be charged $50 at the end of your session*

1 Hour $40.00 
2 Hour $80.00
3 Hour $120.00

name: Rotary Park
description: Rotary Park is a place to play pickleball in Norman, OK. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Amenities include restrooms. The courts are free.

name: The Station
description: The Station is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Moore, OK. There are 5 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The courts cannot be reserved.
open_play_schedule: Open Pickleball is only offered on Wednesday and Friday from 9am-12pm(noon)

name: Westwood Tennis Center
description: Westwood Tennis Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Norman, OK. There are 8 indoor concrete courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. Players have access to food, a pro shop or equipment store, restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, and lights. A one-time fee is required to play.
